hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'backend/.*\.php$' || exit 0; rel="${f#/Users/iliya/Documents/work/phpStormProjects/iliya/widgetis/backend/}"; cd /Users/iliya/Documents/work/phpStormProjects/iliya/widgetis && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend ./vendor/bin/pint "$rel" 2>&1

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'backend/.*\.php$' || exit 0; cd /Users/iliya/Documents/work/phpStormProjects/iliya/widgetis; out=$(docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend ./vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --memory-limit=512M 2>&1); rc=$?; echo "$out"; [ $rc -eq 0 ] || exit 2
